svg.title: CII Advanced Diploma Level 7 Units – Credits per Unit: 50 – Units 991, 993 and 994
svg.desc: Units 991 London Market Specialisation, 993 Strategic Risk Management, and 994 Insurance Market Specialisation each carry 50 credits at RQF Level 7 – the highest credit weighting of any single unit in the CII qualification framework – requiring sustained strategic analysis at board and executive level.
svg.text: Units 991, 993 and 994 – the highest credit weighting of any single unit
in the entire CII qualification framework.
Requires sustained strategic analysis at board and executive level.
